heading: Sunday
text: Sunshine increasing through the afternoon, becoming mostly clear this evening. Clouds will hang around in the Upper Greens. Highs in the upper 50s to low 60s, mid 60s in the broad valleys. Southwest winds shifting westerly 8-14 mph, breezier in the St. Lawrence Valley.

heading: Mother’s Day
text: Sunshine increasing through the afternoon, becoming mostly clear this evening. Clouds will hang around in the Upper Greens. Highs in the upper 50s to low 60s, mid 60s in the broad valleys. Southwest winds shifting westerly 8-14 mph, breezier in the St. Lawrence Valley.

heading: Sunday Night
text: Partly cloudy north, mostly cloudy south with a chance of passing showers. Lows from the upper 30s to the low 40s. Wind diminishing overnight.

heading: Monday
text: Variable clouds and sun with a chance of a passing shower. Highs in the 50s, nearing 60 in the warmer valleys.
